title: Weather Scientist
description: A daily weather journal where kids look out a real window, then stamp the sky, air feel, wind, and weather clothes.
learningGoals: Build weather vocabulary for sky, temperature feel, and wind
Record simple data in a playful journal
interactionModel: observe-journal tap stickers to record weather observations
feedbackModel: Every sticker is accepted with pop and sparkle SFX plus a spoken observation line; the recap reads the weather report back.

modes.title: What to Wear?
modes.skill: connect clothing choices to weather conditions

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
